providers.name: Cinezo API
providers.customizations: Extensive UI control including theme colors, subtitle styling, and feature toggles (PiP, Chromecast, Autoplay).
providers.llm_profile:
A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: Movies: /embed/movie/{tmdbId}; TV: /embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}; Anime: /embed/anime/{AnilistId}/{number}
B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB, AniList
C. QUERY PARAMETERS: 
- primarycolor (string): Main player color theme
- secondarycolor (string): Secondary accent color
- iconcolor (string): Color of player icons
- autoplay (boolean): Auto-play on load
- poster (boolean): Show movie poster
- chromecast (boolean): Enable Chromecast support
- servericon (boolean): Show server selection button
- setting (boolean): Show player settings button
- pip (boolean): Enable Picture-in-Picture mode
- font (string): Subtitle font family (e.g., 'Roboto')
- fontcolor (string): Subtitle text color
- fontsize (integer): Subtitle font size in pixels
- opacity (float 0-1): Subtitle opacity
- logourl (string): Custom logo URL
- server (string): Server name or number for playback
- dub (boolean): For anime, audio preference (true/false)
D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Event-driven progress tracking system monitoring play, pause, and seeked events for persistent resume functionality.
E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Iframe should include allowfullscreen. Supports local storage for watch progress.
F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Highly customizable UI including colors, fonts, and feature toggles via query strings.

providers.name: GoDrivePlayer
providers.customizations: Custom subtitles via .vtt files or JSON arrays.
providers.llm_profile:
A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE — Movie: /player.php?imdb={imdb_id}. TV: /player.php?type=series&tmdb={tmdb_id}&season={season}&episode={episode}.
B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES — IMDB (Movies), TMDB (TV).
C. QUERY PARAMETERS — imdb (string, required for movies): IMDB ID with 'tt' prefix; type (string, required for TV): set to 'series'; tmdb (string, required for TV): TMDB ID; season (number, required for TV): Season number; episode (number, required for TV): Episode number; sub.file (string, optional): URL to .vtt subtitle file; sub.label (string, optional): Label for the subtitle; sub.info (string, optional): JSON string containing an array of subtitle objects (file, label, kind).
D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API — None documented.
E. INTEGRATION NOTES — Custom subtitle files must be served with the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' header.
F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY — Supports custom subtitles via single .vtt files or JSON configurations.

providers.name: SpenEmbed
providers.customizations: Custom accent color via hex code.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE — Movies: /movie/{tmdb_id}, TV: /tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}, Anime: /anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES — TMDB, AniList. C. QUERY PARAMETERS — theme (string): Custom theme color hex code without the # symbol. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API — None documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES — Embeds are responsive; it is recommended to use a container with aspect-video for optimal results. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY — Player accent color can be customized via the theme query parameter.

providers.name: SuperEmbed
providers.customizations: Custom subtitles and VIP player access.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE — Movies: /?video_id={id}&tmdb=1, TV: /?video_id={id}&tmdb=1&s={season}&e={episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES — IMDB (default), TMDB (requires &tmdb=1). C. QUERY PARAMETERS — video_id (string): The IMDB or TMDB ID; tmdb (number): Set to 1 to specify TMDB ID; s/season (number): Season number; e/episode (number): Episode number; check (number): Set to 1 to check VIP player availability (returns 0 or 1); sub_url (string): URL-encoded path to custom subtitles; sub_label (string): URL-encoded label for custom subtitles. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API — None documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES — A VIP player with higher quality and fewer ads is available via the /directstream.php endpoint. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY — Supports custom subtitles and VIP player routing.

providers.name: TryEmbed
providers.customizations: Audio format (sub/dub), autoplay, auto-skip, and start timestamp.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE — Anime: /embed/anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}/{lang} (where lang is 'sub' or 'dub'). B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES — AniList. C. QUERY PARAMETERS — autoplay (boolean): Forces video autoplay on load; autoSkip (boolean): Automatically bypasses opening and ending sequences; startAt (number): Start playback at a specific timestamp in seconds. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API — Commands: play/pause ({}), seek ({time: number}), volume ({level: 0.0 to 1.0}). Events: PLAYER_EVENT (emits event type and currentTime). E. INTEGRATION NOTES — Ad-free premium engine specifically for anime. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY — Audio format toggles, autoplay, auto-skip, and start-time offsets.

B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: IMDB, TMDB
C. QUERY PARAMETERS: title (boolean: toggle title), poster (boolean: toggle poster), autoPlay (boolean), startAt (number: seconds), theme (string: hex code), server (string: server name), hideServer (boolean), fullscreenButton (boolean), chromecast (boolean), sub (string: lang code e.g. en, es, fr), nextButton (boolean: TV only), autoNext (boolean: TV only)
D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: None documented
E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Iframe-based. Multiple available domains: vidfast.pro, vidfast.in, vidfast.io, vidfast.me, vidfast.net, vidfast.pm, vidfast.xyz
F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Highly customizable UI via query parameters including theme colors and playback controls.

providers.customizations: Theme colors, UI element toggles, and automatic episode progression.
providers.llm_profile:
A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: Movies: /movie/{id}; TV: /tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}
B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB, IMDB
C. QUERY PARAMETERS: title (boolean) - toggle media title; poster (boolean) - toggle poster image; autoPlay (boolean) - auto-start playback; startAt (integer) - start time in seconds; theme (string/hex) - player color; server (string) - specific server name; hideServer (boolean) - toggle server selector; fullscreenButton (boolean) - toggle fullscreen button; chromecast (boolean) - toggle Chromecast button; sub (string) - default subtitle language (e.g., en, es, fr); nextButton (boolean) - show 'Next Episode' button at 90% progress (TV only); autoNext (boolean) - auto-play next episode (TV only).
D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Not documented.
E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Multiple available domains for embedding: vidfast.pro, vidfast.in, vidfast.io, vidfast.me, vidfast.net, vidfast.pm, vidfast.xyz.
F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Control over player theme colors, UI visibility (server/fullscreen/chromecast), and playback automation.

providers.customizations: Full visual branding (colors, fonts, logos) and comprehensive playback feature toggles.
providers.llm_profile:
A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: Movies: /embed/movie/{tmdbId}; TV: /embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}; Anime: /embed/anime/{AnilistId}/{number}
B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB (Movies/TV), AniList (Anime)
C. QUERY PARAMETERS: primarycolor (string/hex) - main theme color; secondarycolor (string/hex) - accent color; iconcolor (string/hex) - icon color; autoplay (boolean) - auto-play on load; poster (boolean) - show movie poster; chromecast (boolean) - enable Chromecast; servericon (boolean) - show server selection; setting (boolean) - show settings button; pip (boolean) - enable Picture-in-Picture; font (string) - subtitle font family; fontcolor (string/hex) - subtitle text color; fontsize (integer) - subtitle size in px; opacity (float 0-1) - subtitle opacity; logourl (string/url) - custom logo image; server (string) - specific server name/number; dub (boolean) - for anime, toggle dubbed content.
D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Progress Tracking system emits events including: play, pause, seeked.
E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Embeds are served via the player.vidify.top subdomain.
F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Extensive visual branding options including custom colors, fonts, and logo URLs.

providers.name: VidFun
providers.customizations: Automatic progress saving and postMessage-based playback control.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /embed/movie/{tmdb_id} or /embed/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: None documented. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Supports postMessage for playback control (play, pause, seek). E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Permissive CORS headers allow iframe embedding on any domain; no auth required. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Automatic progress saving via localStorage and full playback control via postMessage.

providers.name: VidKing

providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /embed/movie/{tmdbId} or /embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: color (string, hex), autoPlay (boolean), nextEpisode (boolean), episodeSelector (boolean), progress (number, seconds). D. providers.name: VidLink
providers.customizations: Extensive UI styling, player engine selection, and external subtitle support.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /movie/{tmdbId}, /tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}, /anime/{MALid}/{number}/{subOrDub}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB, MyAnimeList. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: primaryColor, secondaryColor, icons (vid/default), iconColor, title (bool), poster (bool), autoplay (bool), nextbutton (bool), player (jw/default), startAt (seconds), sub_file (url), sub_label (string), fallback_url (url). D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Emits play, pause, seeked, ended, timeupdate via postMessage. E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Requires origin check (https://vidlink.pro) for postMessage; supports external VTT subtitles. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Extensive UI styling, player engine selection, and external subtitle support.

providers.name: VidNest
providers.customizations: Extensive UI control via query parameters to hide or toggle specific player elements.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /movie/{tmdb_id}, /tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}, /anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}/{sub_or_dub}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB, AniList. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: startAt (int, seconds), progress (int, seconds), server (string: lamda, primesrc, sigma, alfa, beta, gama, catflix, hexa, delta), and various UI toggles (servericon, topcaption, topsettings, centerseekbackward, centerplay, centerseekforward, timeslider, mute, volume, timegroup, bottomcaption, bottomsettings, pip, cast, fullscreen, prevepisode, nextepisode) accepting hide/false/0/off. D. PLAYER EVENTS: Supports event-driven progress tracking (play, pause, seeked). E. INTEGRATION NOTES: No setup required, iframe should include allowFullScreen. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Extensive UI control via query parameters to hide or toggle specific player elements.

PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API — Not documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES — Wordpress plugins available for Dooplay/Psyplay themes. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY — Simple color customization via URL suffix.

providers.name: VidSrc.to
providers.customizations: Custom subtitle loading via .vtt files or JSON configuration.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: Movies: /embed/movie/{id}; TV: /embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB and IMDB (IMDB IDs must include the 'tt' prefix). C. QUERY PARAMETERS: sub.info (string/JSON) - used to load multiple subtitle files in the format [{file: 'url', label: 'name', kind: 'captions'}]. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Not documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Custom subtitle files (.vtt) must have the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' header. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Supports custom single or multiple subtitle file injection via URL or JSON.

QUERY PARAMETERS: Mentioned as available for player customization, but specific keys are not listed. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Not documented. E. providers.name: VixSrc
providers.customizations: Visual branding via hex colors, autoplay, start-time offsets, and language selection.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: Movies: /movie/{tmdbId}; TV: /tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: primaryColor (string/Hex) - sets slider/autoplay color; secondaryColor (string/Hex) - sets progress bar background; autoplay (boolean) - toggles auto-start; startAt (integer) - start time in seconds; lang (string) - preferred audio track language. D. PLAYER EVENTS / POSTMESSAGE API: Emits 'PLAYER_EVENT' via postMessage with data containing: event (play, pause, seeked, ended, timeupdate), currentTime (number), duration (number), and video_id (number). E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Supports custom embed domains to bypass ISP blocks and custom CDN proxying. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Extensive visual branding (colors), playback control (autoplay, start time), and language settings.

providers.name: Vidzee
providers.customizations: Provides two distinct player versions (standard and V2) via URL path routing.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /embed/movie/{tmdb_id} and /embed/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode} (also supports /v2/ prefix). B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: None documented. D. PLAYER EVENTS: None documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Recommended iframe attributes: width=100%, height=100%, frameBorder=0, allowFullScreen. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Offers two player versions (standard and V2) via URL path prefix.

providers.name: Vidzen
providers.customizations: Supports provider failover via 'server' parameter and automatic playback state synchronization via postMessage.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /movie/[TMDB_ID] and /tv/[TMDB_ID]/[SEASON]/[EPISODE]. B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: server (string: HyroX, HyroXSRC, HyroXMP4), startAt (number), autoplay (boolean), muted (boolean). D. PLAYER EVENTS: Listens for window.postMessage; emits MEDIA_DATA type containing progress and metadata. E. INTEGRATION NOTES: Requires iframe with scrolling=no and allowFullScreen. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Includes provider failover (server parameter) and playback state persistence via localStorage.

providers.name: Docs
providers.customizations: Unified API that aggregates multiple providers with automatic quality sorting and subtitle injection.
providers.llm_profile: A. EMBED URL STRUCTURE: /api/player (uses query params for ID and type). B. SUPPORTED ID TYPES: TMDB. C. QUERY PARAMETERS: id (string), type (movie/tv), season (int), episode (int). D. PLAYER EVENTS: None documented. E. INTEGRATION NOTES: API returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *; no credentials required. F. CUSTOMIZATION SUMMARY: Unified API that aggregates 8 providers with built-in HLS.js and subtitle support.

QUERY PARAMETERS: server (string, default server index), domainAd (string, domain for splash screen), color (hex string, UI accent), autoplay (boolean, muted autoplay), back (boolean, show back button).
